name_cn:
BOULOGNE Handbag #️⃣ M45832
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique specifications. Dynamic chip, variable code, original factory exclusive fabric, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% authenticity! Original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest gift box.
29 x 16 x 9.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Aged cowhide trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Leather corners
Interior pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 31.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 50.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 25.0 cm
Made in France
